guestDatabase.note: Working shortlist for the independent conversation series. Outreach happens only after Asha confirms each name.

guest.name: Redi Tlhabi
guest.focus: Building a public voice outside a single institution
guest.sourceConnection: Personal network through the radio conference

guest.name: Mandy Wiener
guest.focus: Investigative journalism and its personal cost
guest.preferredAngle: The toll of a long investigation

guest.name: Sisonke Msimang
guest.focus: Memoir and the weight of representing identity

guest.name: Niren Tolsi
guest.focus: The ethics of covering trauma and the image
guest.preferredAngle: What a photograph owes its subject

guest.name: Carien du Plessis
guest.preferredAngle: Covering power over a long horizon

guest.name: Mandla Sithole
guest.focus: Music journalism and the archive of taste
guest.preferredAngle: How a country remembers its sound

guest.name: Reverend Grace Moyo
guest.focus: Faith broadcasting and community radio as civic service
